name: WW-Black Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 packet instant chicken broth and seasoning mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 quart saucepan, heat margarine until bubbly and hot.
2. Add onion and garlic and sauté until onion is softened.
3. Add water, black beans, carrot, celery, broth mix, and bay leaf to the saucepan.
4. Bring mixture to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and cook until vegetables are very soft, about 45 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Remove and discard the bay leaf.
6. Pour mixture into a blender container and process at low speed until smooth. Return soup to the saucepan and stir in sherry, salt, and pepper.
7. Bring to a simmer and let cook until thoroughly heated, about 5 minutes.
8. Serve hot, sprinkling each portion with half of the chopped egg.
